TotemWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWinMultiplierReelsFeature1: At the start of every spin, the two win multiplier reels on the left and right side of the screen will spin to reveal either x1, x2, x3, x5 or "Wild".
TotemWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWinMultiplierReelsFeature2: When "Wild" is revealed on the left win multiplier reel, all symbols on the first reel will be transformed into Wild symbols.
TotemWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWinMultiplierReelsFeature3: When "Wild" is revealed on the right win multiplier reel, all symbols on the third reel will be transformed into Wild symbols.
TotemWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWinMultiplierReelsFeature4: All wins will be multiplied by any revealed multiplier values.
TotemWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyDoubleWildFeatureMultiplier1: When "Wild" is revealed on both left and right win multiplier reels, the Double Wild Feature is triggered.
TotemWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyDoubleWildFeatureMultiplier2: During the Double Wild Feature, both left and right win multiplier reels will respin to reveal either x1, x2, x3 or x5.
TotemWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyDoubleWildFeatureMultiplier3: Stand a chance to win up to %{2500}x of the total bet amount.

TotemWondersRules.GeneralRules1: Totem Wonders is a 3-reel (3 rows in reels 1 and 3, 4 rows in reel 2) video slot featuring 2 win multiplier reels.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 10 bet lines (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 10 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.
